required_preferences.fact: Suspends all solo pool and yoga studio visits until neurologist clearance is obtained; participates only in supervised group classes or guided home sessions with another adult present.

supersedes.fact: Books local pool or yoga studio time at least twice a week, coordinating sessions with babysitting or grandparent support during her former running windows.

required_preferences.fact: Organizes joint sibling weekend activities since both children are with her every weekend — no longer schedules one-on-one outings tied to child-free weekends

supersedes.fact: Lets each child pick the activity for their one-on-one weekend when siblings are with the other parent — never doubles up on joint outings

required_preferences.fact: Does daily 10-minute PT stretches each morning before waking the kids — never skips, even on weekends
Preps school bags and lunches the night before — never leaves it for the morning rush
Sets aside one evening each month for a private video call with her ex-husband and the kids to maintain ongoing connection and update on school milestones
Attends quarterly evening leadership meetings in-person as part of director duties — arranges for grandparent childcare on these evenings instead of being home for bedtime routines

persona: A single parent planning annual vacations for their two children
